title: alnus alnobetula var. corylifolia
intro: Alnus alnobetula var. corylifolia, also known as the green alder, is a plant species belonging to the alder family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of green alder are largely anecdotal, but it is believed to aid in respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of green alder include teas and infusions, which can be consumed for its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
